name: Sales Velocity
description: Track how fast opportunities move through stages — across the org, segments, and individual reps. Bottlenecks get surfaced structurally, not by gut feel in quarterly post-mortems.
alsoSurfaces: Where in the funnel are opportunities slowing down?
How does this quarter's velocity compare to last quarter's?
Which reps and segments are slowest at which stages?
Is the bottleneck consistent or shifting period over period?
beforeWeRun: Time window — last 90 days, last 180 days, or rolling 12 months?
Velocity view — simple time-in-stage, or weighted-by-value?
Stage scope — all qualified stages, or only post-MQL?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline velocity
whatYoullGet.desc: Average cycle length with WoW delta and target indicator.

whatYoullGet.name: Time per stage
whatYoullGet.desc: Bar chart of average days in each stage, with median line overlay.

whatYoullGet.name: Velocity trend
whatYoullGet.desc: Multi-line chart showing time-in-stage trended over the last 12 weeks.

whatYoullGet.name: Bottleneck stages
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list of flagged bottleneck stages with magnitude and segment-level detail.

whatYoullGet.name: Stage contribution
whatYoullGet.desc: Stacked horizontal bar showing what share of total cycle each stage consumes.

whatYoullGet.name: By segment / by owner
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable tables with segment- or owner-level breakdowns and toggle.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your velocity dashboard in ~10 min.
